title: missing table name with invalid column in join using (and problems after resolving it)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_c (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE test_d (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM test_c LEFT JOIN test_d ON test_c.id = test_d.id;
key_bug_features: JOIN using an invalid column name
